Bus Timings

309 Bus Schedule Al Quoz to Sharjah

October 16, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Ever heard of Al Quoz in Dubai? Talk about a commute, right? But don’t worry, the 309 bus has got their backs. This trusty route connects Sharjah straight to Al Quoz, making life way easier for the work crowd. Want to know more about catching the 309? Let’s dive into the details and see how this bus is bridging the gap between home and hustle!

Contents

Al Quoz to Sharjah Bus Timings

As for your information, 309 Bus operates daily from Monday to Sunday, it starts from 05.55 am to 11.55 pm with frequency arrival 30-45 minutes.

So for those of you who want to go to Sharjah from Al Quoz, you don’t need to worry about missing the bus, because the bus will always be there every 30 minutes. And this is the complete schedule or timings for bus 309.

From Al Quoz From Sharjah
07:40 05:45
08:10 06:15
08:40 06:45
09:10 07:15
09:40 07:45
10:10 08:15
10:40 08:45
11:10 09:15
11:40 09:45
12:10 10:15
12:40 10:45
13:10 11:15
13:40 11:45
14:10 12:15
14:40 12:45
15:10 13:15
15:40 13:45
16:10 14:15
16:40 14:45
17:10 15:15
17:40 15:45
18:10 16:15
18:40 16:45
19:10 17:15
19:40 17:45
20:10 18:15
20:40 18:45
21:10 19:15
21:40 19:45
22:10 20:15
22:40 20:45
23:10 21:15
21:45  
22:15  
22:45

309 Bus Route

The 309 bus route begins at Interchange 4 near Emirates Mall in Al Quoz, Dubai, and ends at the Al Rolla Terminal in Sharjah.

It covers several significant stops, making it a practical choice for daily commuters and occasional travelers and for workers. Here are the stops of 309 Bus.1. Interchange 4, Dubai: The starting point near Emirates Mall.

  1. Ithihad Road, Al Safeer Mall: A major commercial area in Sharjah.
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Wahda Road, Subway: Centrally located on Al Wahda Road.

  2. Al Wahda Road, City Center 1: Another central stop on Al Wahda Road.

  3. King Faisal Road, Jumbo (Sony): Situated on King Faisal Road.

  4. Al Rolla Terminal, Sharjah: The final stop in Sharjah.

Other bus routes in Sharjah that you can explore include the 313 bus route, which travels from Al Rolla Terminal to Dubai Airport Terminal 2, and the 113 bus route, which runs from Sharjah to Rashidiya.Read Also: Khor Fakkan to Sharjah Bus Timings ## Journey and Fare

The journey from Al Quoz to Sharjah typically takes around 45 minutes to 1 hour, depending on traffic conditions. And the fare is 20 AED for one payment.

The route is designed to cater to both daily commuters and those traveling for leisure or business, providing a reliable and efficient service between these two key locations.## Journey Experience

The 309 bus from Al Quoz to Sharjah takes passengers on a long yet smooth journey, passing through the busy district of Deira.

The 309 bus route from Al Quoz to Sharjah is an essential link for many commuters, offering a cost-effective and comfortable mode of transportation.

With its frequent service, well-maintained buses, and key stops, it meets the needs of a diverse range of passengers. Whether you are a daily commuter or an occasional traveler, the 309 bus provides a reliable and convenient travel option.## FAQs

What are the operating hours of the 309 bus?The 309 bus operates from 5:55 AM to 11:55 PM daily, with a frequency of every 30 to 45 minutes.How much is the fare for the 309 bus route?The fare for a one-way trip is 20 AED, payable in cash only.How long does the journey take?The journey from Al Quoz to Sharjah takes approximately 45 minutes to 1 hour.Where should I contact for further explanation?For more information, you can contact Dubai RTA at 8009090 or Sharjah RTA at 600525252.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 16, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
